data.content: Plan review approved. The scope is complete and feasible, with explicit handling for Bash 3 portability, IPv6 interface URLs, endpoint timeout bounds, explicit override priority, version-read failures, and the Hermetic Test Policy. Shell launcher behavior belongs in __manual_tests__ because it necessarily generates files and executes bash; the default unit suite will remain host-independent and must still pass unchanged. No security concern: discovery is limited to addresses assigned to the local host and the configured Foolery port.
